nasb.text: Then they told Saul, saying, “Behold, the people are sinning against the Lord by eating with the blood.” And he said, “You have acted treacherously; roll a great stone to me today.”

esv.text: Then they told Saul, “Behold, the people are sinning against the Lord by eating with the blood.” And he said, “You have dealt treacherously; roll a great stone to me here.”

cnv.text: 有人告訴掃羅說：“眾民吃了帶著血的肉，得罪耶和華了。”他說：“你們作了不忠的事了，立刻把一塊大石頭滾到我這裡來。”

ccb.text: 有人告诉扫罗，说：“众人吃了带血的肉，得罪耶和华了。”扫罗说：“你们犯罪了！现在把一块大石头滚到我这里来，
